_comment: Strategy refinement queue (2026-06-18) — the active pipeline for `paper_ready` cells (docs/strategy-readiness-ladder.md). A paper_ready cell is a net-of-fee-positive edge that is NOT yet fold-robust (cleared the demo bar, missed the live-money bar). Each row records WHY it missed live + a concrete refinement HYPOTHESIS to test. /performance-review + the backtesting skill drain this: re-test the hypothesis on the harness, re-tier with scripts/ops/classify_strategy_tier.py, then advance (paper->live proposal), iterate, or reject with evidence. This is distinct from: performance-review-backlog.json (live-strategy tweak puzzles), ml-review-backlog.json (model experiments), health-review-backlog.json (system bugs). Item ids: SRQ-YYYYMMDD-NNN.
_see_also: docs/research/strategy-primitives-recombination-DESIGN.md — the combinatorial primitive-recombination initiative (operator direction 2026-06-18). Its first probes drain SRQ-20260618-001/-002 (regime-filter swap) and -003 (exit-manager swap) by treating each refinement hypothesis as a (entry, filter, exit, timeframe) tuple to sweep + re-tier via classify_strategy_tier.py. DESIGN — for operator review; trainer-gated.

items.source: M15 WS-C alt k-fold gate (detached sweep, trainer-vm-diag #3930/#3936), scripts/ops/m15_ws_c_kfold.sh over freshly-fetched Bybit alt perps. 5-fold anchored walk-forward, net-of-fee 7.5 + 15 bps.
items.cell: trend_4h on {ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT, ADAUSDT, AVAXUSDT}
items.gate_verdict: FAIL (strict every-fold) — but net-of-fee positive overall + 2x-fee headroom; e.g. one cell +26.9R OOS / survives 15 bps. The 5-fold every-fold gate fails them because the most-recent fold (~2025-11-15 -> 2026-06-11) is net-negative (e.g. -5.6R / 35 trades).
items.missed_live_because: Edge is positive across the full OOS window and most folds, but degrades in the recent (late-2025 -> 2026) regime — consistent with a chop/range regime where a breakout-trend follower whipsaws (the same failure mode trend_donchian/fade already gate against on BTC).
items.refinement_hypothesis: Add an ADX / regime entry gate (skip entries when ADX < ~threshold or detected regime = chop), mirroring the live trend_donchian long-only + regime-router treatment, then re-run the k-fold. If the recent losing fold turns flat/positive without killing the trending-regime edge, the cell advances toward live_money_ready. Secondary lever: a min_confidence floor sweep (the harness emits live-parity confidence; --confidence-sweep).
items.next_step: WIRED 2026-06-18: all 5 cells (trend_donchian_{eth,sol,xrp,ada,avax}_4h) are live on bybit_1 DEMO (execution: live, demo-only, both-sides) for decision/ML soak. REMAINING: run the ADX/regime-gated re-sweep on the trainer; re-tier with classify_strategy_tier.py once folds land; a clean every-fold pass + operator approval graduates the family toward real-money bybit_2 (separate Tier-3 gate).

wired_to_demo.note: execution: live on demo (paper money); observe-for-soak, NOT live-money-ready.

items.source: Same WS-C alt k-fold gate run as SRQ-20260618-001 (trainer-vm-diag #3936).
items.cell: htf_pullback_2h on {ETHUSDT, ADAUSDT, SOLUSDT, XRPUSDT, AVAXUSDT}
items.gate_verdict: FAIL (strict every-fold) — net-of-fee positive overall + 2x-fee headroom, fails only the every-fold gate on the recent fold. (eth_pullback_2h is already live on bybit_1 demo from the looser 3-fold WS-C adoption; the 5-fold gate is stricter and it does not clear it — informative, not a regression: it is demo-only.)
items.missed_live_because: Same shape as the trend family — the pullback-continuation edge holds across the full window but the recent regime fold goes negative.
items.refinement_hypothesis: Add an ADX/regime entry gate (pullback-continuation only in trending/transitional regimes, skip chop) + re-test; this is the exact router-policy treatment htf_pullback already has on BTC (long ON in trending/transitional, off in chop). Re-run the k-fold gated and re-tier.
items.next_step: WIRED 2026-06-18: the 4 not-yet-wired symbols ({sol,xrp,ada,avax}_pullback_2h) are now live on bybit_1 DEMO (execution: live, demo-only) for soak; eth_pullback_2h was already wired. REMAINING: run the regime-gated re-sweep on the trainer; re-tier with classify_strategy_tier.py; feed the same ADX/regime refinement to all 5 cells. Graduation to real-money bybit_2 is a separate Tier-3 gate.

wired_to_demo.note: eth_pullback_2h already wired (M15 WS-C). execution: live on demo (paper money); observe-for-soak, NOT live-money-ready.

items.source: Same WS-C alt k-fold gate run; ict_scalp 5m k-fold still executing at session time (multi-year 5m, slow — ADAUSDT in progress per trainer-vm-diag #3936).
items.gate_verdict: REJECT (fee-bleed confirmed 2026-06-18) — the multi-year 5m k-fold completed and the edge is FEE-FRAGILE: gross-positive but it does not survive realistic fees on thin alt books. ADAUSDT: +50R @ 7.5 bps / -38R @ 15 bps; AVAXUSDT: +65R @ 7.5 bps / -26R @ 15 bps. The 7.5 bps -> 15 bps doubling flips both cells from strongly positive to strongly negative, so the strategy lives entirely inside the round-trip cost band — the highest decision frequency (300-1600 trades/window/symbol) that made it the most valuable SOAK candidate is exactly what makes it the most fee-sensitive. NOT paper_ready as-is (a demo soak would generate volume but no net-of-fee edge worth promoting).
items.missed_live_because: Edge sits below the 2x-fee survival bar — the per-trade R is smaller than the fee-doubling delta, so the family is structurally fee-bound at 5m on alt perps. This is a different failure mode from the trend/pullback cells (which are net-of-fee positive overall and fail only the recent-regime fold); ict_scalp 5m fails the fee-headroom bar itself.
items.refinement_hypothesis: Do NOT soak the 5m alt cells as-is. Instead test lower-frequency / higher-edge-per-trade variants that escape the fee band: (a) ict_scalp at 15m (fewer, larger-R trades — same logic, longer hold, less round-trip drag); (b) a higher-selectivity parameter set (raise min_confidence / tighten the HTF-bias + session/killzone filter — the unit already has session_filter_enabled — to trade only the strongest setups, lifting per-trade R above the fee band); (c) a displacement-continuation momentum scalp (enter on a confirmed displacement leg + FVG continuation rather than every mean-reversion tag — fewer, trend-aligned entries); (d) a maker-entry VWAP-band mean-reversion (post-only limit entries at the VWAP band edges to EARN the maker rebate / pay zero taker fee, directly attacking the fee bleed rather than the signal).
items.next_step: REJECTED for direct demo soak (fee-bleed). Open a fresh research thread on the four low-TF/higher-edge alternatives above; backtest each on the same alt panel under the 7.5/15 bps net-of-fee k-fold; re-tier any survivor with classify_strategy_tier.py and open a new SRQ row if a variant clears paper_ready. The 5m ict_scalp alt cells themselves are not advanced.

alternatives_to_test: higher-selectivity params (raise min_confidence + session/killzone + HTF-bias tightening)
maker-entry VWAP-band mean-reversion (post-only limits to earn maker rebate / avoid taker fee)
